title: Techguns Re:
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rGBrurFi/images/fec1624a36a6159cfa43cc9ace4fbaf8b9933a2f.png)
**Techguns Re:**
changes the appearance of *Techguns* to a more familiar vanilla-like style.
(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techguns).

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rGBrurFi/images/b33834167bd97b93adf13ac049c3075fb12d405c.png)
